examples: Objective: Analysis characteristic and regularity of epidermolysis bullosa type eruption.
Preclinical progress has been achieved in the treatment of wounds, epidermolysis bullosa and ichthyosis.
Epidermolysis bullosa acquisita(EBA) is an autoimmune subepidermal bullous disease. This disease is rare in childhood.
Liao's crusade led to the first stem cell treatment for epidermolysis bullosa, also known as EB.
An estimated 15, 000 children in the United States suffer from EB, according to the Dystrophic Epidermolysis Bullosa Research Association of America.
